headline: PVH Corp. to Report Q1 Earnings: What Surprise Awaits Investors?
summary: PVH eyes Q1 FY26 revenues up 0.7% to $2B, but EPS is expected to drop about 22% as tariffs and uneven demand weigh on margins.

raw.headline: PVH Corp. to Report Q1 Earnings: What Surprise Awaits Investors?
raw.summary: PVH eyes Q1 FY26 revenues up 0.7% to $2B, but EPS is expected to drop about 22% as tariffs and uneven demand weigh on margins.

headline: Carnival Sees Fuel Cost Relief As Travel Interest Shows Early Strength
summary: Oil prices have fallen sharply following progress in U.S. Iran negotiations, easing a key cost pressure for Carnival (NYSE:CCL) and other cruise operators. The drop in fuel costs comes alongside recent consumer data pointing to more vacation planning and interest in cruise travel. Carnival, a major global cruise operator, runs fuel intensive ships across multiple brands and regions, so swings in oil prices directly affect its operating expenses. The recent pullback in oil provides immediate...

headline: Holland America Expands to Year-Round Europe Cruising
summary: Holland America Line is introducing year-round cruising in Europe, expanding its presence in the region with an extended 2027-2028 season sailing through winter. With Nieuw Statendam remaining in Europe year-round, the cruise line is offering more opportunities than ever to experience the region beyond traditional summer travel.

headline: Carnival Data Breach Exposes Names, Addresses And Government ID Numbers After Cybercriminals Trick Employee In Social Engineering Attack
summary: Carnival disclosed a cyberattack that exposed personal data after attackers compromised an employee account.
